scripts.build: npm --prefix packages/lib run build && npm --prefix packages/app run build
scripts.check: npm --prefix packages/lib run check && npm --prefix packages/lib run build && npm --prefix packages/app run check
scripts.changeset-publish: node -e "if (!process.env.NPM_TOKEN) { console.log('Skipping publish: NPM_TOKEN is not set'); process.exit(0); }" && changeset publish
scripts.dev: npm --prefix packages/lib run build && npm --prefix packages/app run dev
scripts.lint: npm --prefix packages/lib run lint && npm --prefix packages/lib run build && npm --prefix packages/app run lint
scripts.lint:tests: npm --prefix packages/lib run lint:tests && npm --prefix packages/lib run build && npm --prefix packages/app run lint:tests
scripts.lint:effect: npm --prefix packages/lib run lint:effect && npm --prefix packages/lib run build && npm --prefix packages/app run lint:effect
scripts.test: npm --prefix packages/lib run test && npm --prefix packages/lib run build && npm --prefix packages/app run test
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix packages/lib run typecheck && npm --prefix packages/lib run build && npm --prefix packages/app run typecheck
scripts.start: npm --prefix packages/lib run build && npm --prefix packages/app run start
